tables.description: The BA23 in WHI circulating plasma miRNA sample attributes data table includes pull IDs, plate ID, date created, experiment name, run date and ending time, signal smoothing, body site where sample was collected, analyte type, histology type, and tumor status.

variables.name: Analyte_Type
variables.description: The analyte type of the sample

variables.name: Body Site
variables.description: The body part from which the sample is collected

variables.name: Date.Created
variables.description: The date that data was exported to excel (done in Nov 2015).

variables.name: Experiment.Name
variables.description: Automatically generated beginning with each barcode, follwed by _OA miRNA Human

variables.name: Experiment.Run.End.Time
variables.description: Actual run date and run ending time (from April 2014 ~ Oct. 2015)

variables.name: Histology_Type
variables.description: The type of sample, cell or tissue type or subtype of the sample

variables.name: Instrument.Serial.Number
variables.description: 2 different instruments were used

variables.name: Is_tumor
variables.description: The tumor status of the sample

variables.name: Plate_Barcode
variables.description: Unique code to each openarray plate

variables.name: PullNumber
variables.description: Pull number (1 to 4)

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Unique ID for each vial of processed peripheral blood created from each WHI participant

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Unique for each WHI participant

variables.name: Signal.Smoothing.On
variables.description: Most are "TRUE", only 7 entries are "1"

tables.description: The BA23 in WHI blood methylation sample attributes data table includes pull IDs, plate ID, methylation array ID, array position, body site where sample was collected, analyte type, histology type, and tumor status.

variables.name: Analyte_Type
variables.description: The analyte type of the sample

variables.name: Array_pos
variables.description: Illumina 405k array position of saples, row (up to 6) followed by column (up to 2), R01 to R06 followed by either C01 or C02

variables.name: BA23_Pull_ID_DNA
variables.description: Pull, there are 4 pulls by the WHI of DNA: BA23-5, BA23-6, BA23-7, BA23-8

variables.name: Body Site
variables.description: The body part from which the sample is collected

variables.name: Histology_Type
variables.description: The type of sample, cell or tissue type or subtype of the sample

variables.name: Is_tumor
variables.description: The tumor status of the sample

variables.name: Methyl_Array
variables.description: Illumina 450k methylation array ID, up to 12 samples per array

variables.name: Plate
variables.description: 96 well plate used for DNA bisulfite conversion, A total of 24 plates were used.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Unique ID for each vial of processed peripheral blood created from each WHI participant

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Unique for each WHI participant
